paper_notes: Multi-formulation comparison paper with formulation-defining preparation and measured formulation results, but weaker explicit materials and optimization closure surfaces.

PREPARATION_METHOD.selection_intent: Frontload the canonical nanoparticle preparation sequence that defines how the compared formulations are produced.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: prepared by nanoprecipitation using an acetone-water system... added dropwise... continuous stirring... evaporated... washed... centrifuged

PREPARATION_METHOD.inclusion_notes: This role should carry the main formulation-construction procedure rather than broad introductory context.
PREPARATION_METHOD.exclusion_notes: Do not substitute with downstream assay or biodistribution paragraphs.
PREPARATION_METHOD.notes: The paper mixes procedural and background material, so clean procedural anchoring matters.

MATERIALS.selection_intent: Retain a clean materials inventory when it is structurally distinct enough to support interpretation of the formulations.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: Rhodamine... gatifloxacin sesquihydrate... PLGA... polysorbate 80... Labrafil... obtained from suppliers

MATERIALS.inclusion_notes: Useful supporting context when the inventory is cleanly separated from preparation text.
MATERIALS.exclusion_notes: Do not frontload if the candidate is heavily merged with introduction or procedure.
MATERIALS.notes: Materials are present, but may be structurally fused with nearby method text.

FORMULATION_TABLE.selection_intent: Frontload the table that defines the compared nanoparticle formulations and their composition-level differences.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: formulation identifiers with rhodamine, gatifloxacin, polysorbate 80, and Labrafil entries

FORMULATION_TABLE.inclusion_notes: This is the preferred composition-defining table if the extraction is readable enough.
FORMULATION_TABLE.exclusion_notes: Do not replace with noisy partial table fragments or downstream assay tables.
FORMULATION_TABLE.notes: Formulation identity is table-centered rather than fully restated in prose.

FORMULATION_RESULT.selection_intent: Frontload the measured formulation-result evidence that compares the candidate formulations and supports selection among them.

expected_sources.section_title: Characteristics of the nanoparticle formulations prepared
expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: mean particle size, zeta potential, and encapsulation efficiency across formulations
mean particle sizes... encapsulation efficiency... lower particle sizes were obtained for formulations prepared with polysorbate 80

FORMULATION_RESULT.inclusion_notes: Use the measured comparison surface, not broad narrative interpretation, as the main result evidence.
FORMULATION_RESULT.exclusion_notes: Do not let biodistribution or release-study paragraphs displace formulation-result evidence.
FORMULATION_RESULT.notes: Result evidence is spread across a summary table and nearby narrative.

OPTIMIZATION_RESULT.selection_intent: Retain only explicit comparative selection or best-formulation statements if they are clearly stated.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: the most appropriate formulation from this point of view... formulations prepared with polysorbate 80 increased passage through the BBB

OPTIMIZATION_RESULT.inclusion_notes: Use only when the paper makes a real comparative selection statement.
OPTIMIZATION_RESULT.exclusion_notes: Do not force a formal optimization reading where the paper is mainly comparative.
OPTIMIZATION_RESULT.notes: This paper is not a canonical optimization archetype, so this role should stay conservative.

CONTEXT_FALLBACK.selection_intent: Retain a small amount of supporting context only when it helps connect preparation, formulation identity, and measured outcomes.

expected_sources.raw_text_excerpt: comparison of functionalized and nonfunctionalized nanoparticles in the context of BBB passage

negative_signals: downstream biology unrelated to formulation selection
CONTEXT_FALLBACK.inclusion_notes: Fallback context should remain secondary to preparation and formulation evidence.
CONTEXT_FALLBACK.exclusion_notes: Do not use fallback to hide missing primary formulation evidence.
CONTEXT_FALLBACK.notes: Supporting context is acceptable, but should not become the main evidence surface.
